slides.title: What Changed
bullets: Agents emit docx, pptx, xlsx, html, json, and markdown
Artifacts are validated for macros and external relationships

slides.title: Domain Learning
bullets: Scenario results feed a learning ledger

slides.title: Model Experiment
bullets: qwen3:8b-q4_K_M: A security or quality control measure for local agents generating files in a sandbox is implementing strict input validation and output sanitization to prevent malicious or malformed file creation.
gemma4:26b: Implement automated file integrity monitoring and malware scanning within the sandbox to detect unauthorized modifications or malicious payloads before they exit the isolated environment.
tinyllama:latest: Satisfactory Agent for Local Agents Generating Files in Sandbox

slides.title: DOE Result
bullets: Deck depth, document depth, and dashboard depth were varied
Best setting uses richer artifacts with security pack

slides.title: Decision
bullets: Promote passing artifacts into the UI build flow
